title: abutilon excelsior
intro: Abutilon excelsior, also known as the golden flower of Peru, is a flowering plant species native to South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Abutilon excelsior include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce fever, and alleviate skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Abutilon excelsior can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
